notes: Iteration 2 shows massive improvement over iteration 1. With-skill now achieves 100% pass rate (vs 0% in iteration 1).
The skill successfully forces the agent to actually run benchmarks and report real data.
Without-skill baseline is inconsistent: eval-3 passes all assertions (agent chose to benchmark on its own) while eval-1 and eval-2 fail most.
The skill's strongest value-add is on eval-2 (overlap detection) where it correctly recommends 'don't optimize' backed by data, while without-skill recommends optimizing based on theory.
